Package com.dimitrismantas.torch.core.graph.shortestpaths.utils.heuristics

Class AbstractHeuristic

java.lang.Object
com.dimitrismantas.torch.core.graph.shortestpaths.utils.heuristics.AbstractHeuristic
Direct Known Subclasses:
ALTHeuristic, AStarGreatCircleDistanceHeuristic, AStarTravelTimeHeuristic, DijkstraHeuristic
public abstract class AbstractHeuristic extends Object
A contract for a generic heuristic, which all heuristics must follow.
Since:
1.0.0

    protected Vertex
    refV

    • estimateCostToReferenceVertex

      public abstract int estimateCostToReferenceVertex(Vertex v, short numExecutions)
      Calculates the value of the heuristic that corresponds to a given v.
      Parameters:
      v - The v to be used during the calculation.
      Returns:
      The value of the heuristic that corresponds to this v.
